chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Cr. Bail Application No.S-941 of 2022 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 1. For orders on office objections. 2. For hearing of main case. 16.09.2022. Applicant is present on ad-interim pre-arrest bail. Mr. Mian Taj Muhammad Keerio, Advocate for applicant. Ms. Sana Memon, Assistant P.G. O R D E R MUHAMMAD IQBAL KALHORO, J- On a tip off, ASI, complainant, Hazoor Bux of P.S Khorwah during patrolling with his staff stopped a Hino Truck No.6319 and arrested driver Abdul Wahid on 28.07.2022 at 1900 hours after recovering from the Truck 10 packets containing 12 bundles each with 10 packets in every bundle, total 12000 puries of Zaafrani Pati used in Gutka. Necessary papers were prepared. In investigation, applicant was disclosed to be owner of recovered property by the co-accused, however, no material was found connecting the applicant with the property and the case against him was disposed of under “C” class but learned Magistrate did not agree with the report and took cognizance of offence against him. Citing these grounds, learned Defence Counsel has pleaded for bail, which has not been opposed by learned Assistant P.G. Accordingly, this application is allowed and ad-interim pre-arrest bail already granted to the applicant is hereby confirmed on same terms and conditions. 2. The observations made hereinabove are tentative in nature and shall not influence the trial Court while deciding the case on merits. JUDGE Shahid
